sections.description: Member management for parents' associations (ANPA/AMPA) on WordPress: passwordless member area, children and extracurricular enrolment, encrypted SEPA banking, season lifecycle, an admin dashboard, and self-hosted updates from Gitea.
sections.changelog:
1.24.0

  • Self-hosted updates from the public Gitea repository (plugin-update-checker, JSON metadata mode).

1.23.0

  • New-socio approval workflow, session dropdown menu, verification module groundwork.
